---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation.
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the documentation issue.

## Location

Where is the documentation issue?

- [ ] README
- [ ] Build instructions
- [ ] Installation instructions
- [ ] Troubleshooting
- [ ] Third-party notices or licensing
- [ ] In-editor help
- [ ] Other:

Link to the relevant file or section if possible.

## Problem

What is missing, unclear, outdated, or incorrect?

## Suggested Change

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Audience

Who is affected by this documentation issue?

- [ ] New users
- [ ] Mod authors
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] Maintainers
- [ ] Other:

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, or related issues if useful.
